title: Elementary type errors crash server
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, value String, flag UInt8);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, flag) VALUES (1, 'test', 1);
SELECT id, toString(value) || '1' AS value_plus_one FROM test_table;
SELECT id - 1 AS id_minus_one FROM test_table;
SELECT flag + 1 AS flag_plus_one FROM test_table;
